news_reports.headline: Massive Protests at Vietnam Factory 04
news_reports.content: Over 2,000 workers walked out of Vietnam Factory 04 today protesting unpaid overtime, 70-hour work weeks, and illegal withholding of passports.

news_reports.headline: Chemical Spill Linked to Vietnam Factory 04
news_reports.content: Local environmental agencies report that toxic dye runoff from Vietnam Factory 04 has severely contaminated the local river, causing a massive fish die-off. Factory management denies involvement.

news_reports.headline: Taiwan Semiconductor Output Increases
news_reports.content: Production of new AI chips is up 15% this quarter, easing global supply chain bottlenecks.
